SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-20-2018 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT HACKETT, DYLAN T. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT LAI, CHING L. CHARLIE LAI DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT COULD HAVE ASKED COURT IN ALHAMBRA, CA. FOR COSTS; "MALICIOUS PROSECUTION" CLAIMS ARE NOT ALLOWED IN SMALL CLAIMS COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED [X] THE REQUEST WAS TIMELY SUBMITTED TO COURT; FILING DATE WAS LESS THAN 10 DAYS, DUE TO COURT DELAY AND NO FAULT OF PLAINTIFF CCP. 1163.5 TO (A) (Z).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-20-2018 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SC-105A): THE PARTIES MUST GO TO COURT IN ORDER TO BE HEARD. HEARING DATE: 3/20/18 AT 3:30PM IN DEPT 506
FILED SC-105 ANSWER - THE ANSWER WAS RECEIVED AFTER COURT'S DIRECTIVE TO PARTIES TO GO TO COURT.
CORRESPONDENCE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAI, CHING L. CHARLIE LAI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HACKETT, DYLAN T. DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF NOTHING. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS WERE PREVIOUSLY ADJUDICATED IN AN APPEALS HEARING IN CASE CSM-16-851485 HELD ON FEBRUARY 16, 2017, WITH A FINDING AGAINST PLAINTIFF ON IDENTICAL ISSUES AS THIS ACTION (RES JUDICATA). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
